tr.td: Leukocytes [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
Erythrocytes [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
Hematocrit [Volume Fraction] of Blood by Automated count
MCV [Entitic mean volume] in Red Blood Cells by Automated count
MCHC [Entitic Mass/volume] in Red Blood Cells by Automated count
Erythrocyte distribution width [Entitic volume] by Automated count
Platelets [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
Platelet distribution width [Entitic volume] in Blood by Automated count
Platelet [Entitic mean volume] in Blood by Automated count

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All hematological parameters are within normal limits except for mildly elevated mean platelet volume (MPV) and platelet distribution width (PDW), which may indicate increased platelet turnover or activation. Platelet count is at the lower end of normal. No evidence of anemia, leukocytosis, or other cytopenias. Correlate with clinical context; consider repeating if clinically indicated or if there are bleeding or thrombotic symptoms.

text.div: Provider Organization: Centro Privado de Educación Especial Parálisis Cerebral Infantil
